ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-15-2013. JUN-19-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR GUY ALLAN WILSON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUL-15-2013 THROUGH OCT-13-2013.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE HARTFORD INSURANCE COMPANY OF THE MIDWEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, JOE AN INDIVIDUAL $2,895.21 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,895.21, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF.
